activation.subject: Activate your administrator account
activation.created: Your administrator account has been created successfully.
activation.cta_text: Click the button below to activate your account:
activation.security_notice: For security reasons, we recommend changing your password after your first login.
activation.ignore: If you did not request this account creation, please ignore this email.

reset.subject: Reset your password
reset.title: Password Reset
reset.cta_text: Click the button below to set a new password:
reset.validity: This link is valid for 1 hour.

access_code.subject: Your eKYC access code
access_code.intro: Your account has been created successfully. Here is your unique access code to log in to the eKYC application:
access_code.label: Your access code
access_code.warning: ⚠️ This code is personal and confidential. Do not share it with anyone.
access_code.contact: If you were not expecting this message, please contact your bank advisor.
